sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Lake layer record for gaz_id 262313, "Lane Lake", Lake, Mono County, CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":262313,"gaz_name":"Lane Lake","gaz_featureclass":"Lake","fcode":39004,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Mono"}; geometry (Web Mercator -13307294.1177, 4620838.6353) converts to lon -119.541457, lat 38.292568, matching the file's recorded coordinate (-119.5416, 38.2927) to within ~50m.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(76) — Lane Lake
sources.quotedText: (76) Lane Lake (Mono Co.). All year. Only artificial lures may be used. 2 trout

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(a) — General Provisions for waters listed in the special-regulations table
sources.quotedText: Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

sources.title: Fishing Rules and Regulations - Mono County, CA
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: R6 Mono Lane Lake Lahontan Cutthroat Trout Fingerling Put and Grow August-September

parameters.note: Only artificial lures may be used at Lane Lake.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: The table entry sets a 2-trout daily bag limit; per 14 CCR 7.50(a)(4), unless otherwise provided it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit, so the possession limit also equals 2.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Lane Lake (Region 6, Mono Co.) for fingerling-size Lahontan Cutthroat Trout under the Put and Grow program, with a stated release month range of August-September. This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant.
